Assume roundtrip efficiency is 81%, battery degradation cost is $25/MWh and state of charge is limited to a range of 10% to 90%, prices from 2010 to 2024 represent the 15-year window

tool_input.query:
WITH prices AS (
  SELECT timestamp, lmp
  FROM ercot_lmp
  WHERE zone_name='west'
    AND zone_type='hub'
    AND is_day_ahead=true
    AND timestamp >= '2010-01-01'
    AND timestamp < '2025-01-01'
), ranked AS (
  SELECT timestamp, lmp,
         ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY lmp DESC, timestamp) AS rn
  FROM prices
)
SELECT COUNT(*) AS hours, AVG(lmp) AS avg_price, MIN(lmp) AS min_price, MAX(lmp) AS max_price,
       SUM(CASE WHEN rn=1 THEN lmp ELSE 0 END) AS top1_lmp,
       SUM(CASE WHEN rn<=24 THEN lmp ELSE 0 END) AS top24_lmp,
       SUM(CASE WHEN rn<=168 THEN lmp ELSE 0 END) AS top168_lmp
FROM ranked;
